dialogos.texto_en: *sigh*
(At that time, I was really surprised, but\n it wasn't like I was scared or disgusted\n or anything like that.)
(Really...\n In my heart, I'm glad that Futaro\n is becoming more proactive.)
How about spending some time...just the two of us?
(What should I do?!)
(I don't hate the idea, but I ran away,\n I wonder what Futaro thinks?)
(I hurt him, didn't I?\n Even during dinner, something felt off.\n What should I do? I have to apologize!)
(But, even if I apologize, then what?\n I don't even know if Futaro really wants\n to do something spectacular, but, but...!)
I'm home.\nMiku, are you awake?
Y-yeah, I am.
I'm coming in.
Huh? Ichika too?
Miku, can we talk to you a little?
Talk to me...?
You know what it's about.\nIt's about Fu-kun.
Yotsuba and Itsuki-chan\nare also worried about you, Miku.
...Sorry.
No need to apologize.
But really now, I think it's time you tell us.\nWhy are you avoiding Futaro-kun?
That's...
(Everyone's worried about me.\n But I still feel like I can\n only talk to a certain someone...)
Miku, there are only two more days left on the trip.\nAt this rate,\nwe won't be able to make any good memories.
And once we get back, Fu-kun will go to Tokyo.\nHe'll be gone from your sight.
Is that okay with you?
Ah...
(If Futaro goes to Tokyo like this,\n he and I will%p-2;――%p;)
Well, if you're avoiding Fu-kun,\nthen it shouldn't be a problem if he's gone, huh.
...That's not it.\nIt is a problem.\nI don't want that.
The truth is, I want to be with Futaro forever!
...I know that.\nThen, why are you avoiding him?
Talk to us.\nI'll listen to anything, and support you.\nI may not be as good as Futaro-kun, but I'll do my best.
Thank you, Ichika, Nino.
But, please don't tell Futaro about this.
Okay, we promise.
I see.\nThis was a difficult topic for us to discuss.\nI'm sorry.
No,\nit's me who should apologize...\nI should have discussed this with you all earlier.
I understand why you're worried.\nAfter all, Fu-kun is a boy.\nA boy you're going out with.
Still, it's hard to imagine Futaro-kun\nturning into a wolf, or something like that%p-2;――
Well, you never know.\nThere could be a sudden switch in personality.
There could be, huh...
But, what about you?\nHow do you feel about it?
I don't mind, but...\nI don't know Futaro's true feelings, so...
Miku, really.\nThat's obvious, isn't it?
Obvious...that she doesn't understand his feelings?
Yes.\nBecause, you haven't asked him or anything, have you?
B-but I can't ask him about this.\nI might make him uncomfortable.
It's OKAY to make him uncomfortable!\nYou're his GIRLFRIEND!\nThat's what you SHOULD be trying to work out with each other!
But you were the one who was worrying\nand panicking without any reason,\nand what's the point of making us worry about you?
That's right.\nI guess feelings don't get across\nunless you put them into words.
But it's not good to just wait for Futaro-kun's words,\nright Miku?
('It's not good to just wait...')
(That's it...)
(When I confessed to Futaro at the aquarium.\n When I kissed him on the rooftop.)
(I might have forgotten who I was at the time.)
...Yeah.\nWhat's important is to tell him.
Thank you, both of you.
Great. Hope you're back to your usual self now.
Good, then.\nWell, I'm glad that's what you were worried about.
But if you were\navoiding Fu-kun because of us or something,\nI would have floored you.
Woah, scary!\nNino, you really haven't changed.
(But, that's Nino.)
(Ichika, Nino, Yotsuba and Itsuki...\n Thank you for being by my side.)
